title: Creamy Mushroom Curry
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired curry made with sautéed mushrooms and a hint of lassi, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the garam masala, cumin powder, and salt. Stir to combine.
Add the lassi and flavorful yogurt. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
